roi_reason: Blocks all downstream dispatch: no packet can be trusted while wiring currency is unproven. Removes recurring founder verification workload. Risk_reduction across every lane.
context_summary: Registry data/github_automation_registry_v1.json lists active automation surfaces. Alive docs data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json declare read surfaces for SG, NOOS, SourceA, Library. Latest workflow census receipt (workflow-census-20260706T093358Z) reported audit_status RED with loops that never produced receipts. Task: establish whether current wiring claims are evidence-backed TODAY, without trusting any agent self-report.
task: Audit wiring currency for SG / NOOS / SourceA / Library. 1) Run scripts/verify_agent_read_staleness_v1.sh; capture full output. 2) For each registry entry in data/github_automation_registry_v1.json, locate its most recent receipt in receipts/; record receipt path + timestamp; entries with no receipt in freshness window are flagged STALE_DATA, not guessed. 3) Cross-check data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json pointers against files that actually exist on disk; list dangling pointers. 4) Re-run workflow census script and diff against workflow-census-20260706T093358Z audit_flags: resolved / persisting / new. 5) Emit one receipt to receipts/p0pgr/ with verdict per surface: CURRENT | STALE | DANGLING | NO_RECEIPT.
constraints: read-only: no file edits outside receipts/p0pgr/
stale rows reported as STALE_DATA, never interpolated
allowed_actions: write exactly one receipt to receipts/p0pgr/
forbidden_actions: no authority flip between SG / NOOS / SourceA / Library
no edits to registries, verifiers, or gates
no PASS based on agent self-report or prose-as-proof
stop_rule: Stop after writing the single audit receipt. Do not attempt repairs; flagged items return to the loop as repair candidates.
